# CWE-324 safe — Use of a Key Past its Expiration Date (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-324-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"errors"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type ApiKeyRow struct {
	Secret    string
	ExpiresAt time.Time
}

func SignWebhook(c *GinCtx, row ApiKeyRow, body []byte) ([]byte, error) {
	if time.Now().After(row.ExpiresAt) {
		return nil, errors.New("signing key expired")
	}
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(row.Secret))
	mac.Write(body)
	return mac.Sum(nil), nil
}

func HandlePartnerHook(c *GinCtx) error {
	row := ApiKeyRow{Secret: c.Request.Header.Get("X-Key"), ExpiresAt: time.Now().Add(24 * time.Hour)}
	if time.Now().After(row.ExpiresAt) {
		return errors.New("reject expired partner key")
	}
	_, err := SignWebhook(c, row, []byte(c.Request.URL.Query().Get("payload")))
	return err
}
